hooks.command: jq -r '.worktree_path' | { read -r wt; cp "C:/vishal/xp/wovo/.env.local" "$wt/.env.local" 2>/dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage": "Copied .env.local to worktree"}' || echo '{"systemMessage": "Warning: .env.local not found in main repo"}'; }

jq -r '.worktree_path' | { read -r wt; cd "$wt" && bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage": "Installed dependencies in worktree"}' || echo '{"systemMessage": "Warning: bun install failed — run manually"}'; }
